title: Rewards — NFT certificates and token rewards for class completion
description: Epic E-02. All reward-related features for M4: teacher configuration of NFT certificate rewards with metadata validation (F-05); teacher configuration of fungible token rewards with amount validation (F-06); combined NFT + token reward configuration (F-07); teacher/admin-initiated batch or selective airdrop with fee estimate, partial failure retry, and duplicate prevention — platform wallet pays all minting fees (F-10); reward invalidation on refund: NFT flagged revoked on-chain + platform, token flagged for clawback (F-16); student My Rewards view with delivery status and wallet destination (F-17); student self-mint of NFT cert or token reward via CIP-30 wallet paying ~1 ADA minting fee — fallback to custodial mint if no external wallet (F-18); reward eligibility notification on class completion (F-19). Depends on payments contract for CIP-30 wallet infrastructure (submit-signed-tx.mjs, sign-tx.mjs).

pre_conditions: payments contract is converged — CIP-30 wallet infrastructure (submit-signed-tx.mjs, sign-tx.mjs, get-custodial-address.mjs) is operational
Blockfrost API key (preprod) and platform wallet (OWNER_WALLET_ADDR, ROOT_KEY, OWNER_PKH) are configured in .env
web3/config/preprod.json contains current Conway-era protocol parameters
Student completion tracking is operational (existing platform feature)
post_conditions: F-05: Teachers enable/configure/disable NFT certificate reward per class; incomplete metadata rejected with field-level errors; config locked at student enrollment time (SC-E02-06)
F-06: Teachers enable/configure/disable token reward per class; invalid amounts rejected; config locked at student enrollment time
F-07: NFT and token rewards configured independently and delivered together in a single airdrop

F-10: Teachers/admins initiate batch or selective airdrop with fee estimate before confirmation; partial failures listed with retry; duplicate delivery prevented (SC-E02-02); platform wallet pays all minting fees; teacher wallet not required for airdrop
F-16: Refund triggers on-chain metadata update flagging NFT as revoked + platform revocation status (SC-E02-05); token reward flagged for clawback in course_histories
F-17: Students view all earned rewards with type, amount, delivery status (delivered/pending/failed/revoked), and wallet destination (custodial or external)
F-18: Students with CIP-30 wallet self-mint NFT cert or token reward paying ~1 ADA minting fee; fallback custodial mint available; self_minted status recorded in course_histories.certificate_status
F-19: Eligibility notification shown immediately on class completion; eligibility badge on completed class page; cleared after reward receipt
invariants: Only students who have met the existing platform completion criteria are eligible for reward airdrop or self-mint (SC-E02-04)
NFT minting policy must support on-chain metadata updates to enable revocation flags — do not change the minting policy in a way that loses this capability (SC-E02-05)
Platform wallet (OWNER_WALLET_ADDR) pays all airdrop minting fees; teacher wallet is never charged for teacher-initiated airdrops
CIP-30 self-mint uses partial sign flow — student signs, server merges with owner witness and submits via Blockfrost (same pattern as ADA purchase)

acceptance: Teacher configures NFT certificate reward with required metadata; incomplete metadata rejected
Teacher configures token reward with valid amount; invalid amount rejected
Teacher initiates airdrop to all eligible students with fee estimate displayed before confirmation
Student self-mints NFT certificate via CIP-30 wallet paying ~1 ADA minting fee
Student rewards view shows all earned rewards with correct delivery status
Refund-triggered reward invalidation marks NFT revoked on-chain and in platform; token flagged for clawback
Student sees reward eligibility notification immediately on class completion
